artifact_summary: Title page for Appendix A of the Hazen PLC Hardware Evaluation report regarding the HFC AWTP PLC Network within the Howard F. Curren AWTP SCADA System Master Plan.
artifact_key_elements: Howard F. Curren AWTP SCADA System
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the designated title page for Appendix A of the Hazen PLC Hardware Evaluation report. It specifically delineates the scope of the HFC AWTP PLC Network, functioning as a critical section header within the broader HFC AWTP Master Plan for the Howard F. Curren Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) System.
